summary: Great audience recording with crystal‑clear sound, featuring a blazing Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain sequence
review: The reviewer praises this audience (AUD) tape as superior to other circulating versions, calling it a great and clear capture of an excellent 1985 show. Highlights include a scorching Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain segue, and overall enthusiasm for the tour’s performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments about both the show (great performance) and recording (excellent AUD), but only a single review limits certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a "great AUD" and better than other known audience versions, implying clear and well‑balanced capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Enthusiastic about the tour; notable segue of Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain praised as a highlight.
